title: Fix Galactus sprite scale on vote page

log.context: Fix Galactus sprite scale on vote page

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**`/mnt/data/hello-world/refinery.html`** (sprite vote page):
- Canvas creation loop: Galactus canvases are now 160x240px instead of 40x60px
- Drawing loop: Galactus uses `ctx.scale(2, 2)` with draw coordinates `(80, 232)` instead of the standard `ctx.scale(0.5, 0.5)` with `(40, 116)` — net result is 4x the pixel area of other sprites, matching "2x compared to all others"
